test_description: Remove or resolve the backward-dependent entry markers (`2`, `عليه`, `7 - صحيح`, opening `و`) while keeping the rest of the unit unchanged.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether the local failure is truly entry-frame driven or whether deeper structural problems remain even after entry repair.

test_description: For each reviewed failure case, ask whether the core theory is still largely recoverable even though direct study-readiness fails.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: Confusion between independent understandability and directly study-ready status.

test_description: Treat the Ibn Malik quotation as a standalone rule unit and strip the current-source quote frame.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: Loss of quote-layer function and false flattening of who is proving what.

test_description: Use the user's own warning that not every quotation is proof to attack any overgeneral version of quote-layer doctrine.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: A too-broad rule that collapses every quotation into proof.

test_description: Split the matn line from its explanation and evaluate whether the explanation can still be safely anchored without manhunt or misbinding.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: Over-splitting that destroys the explained/explanation relation.

test_description: Apply a percentage-only overlap rule to the reviewed 95/5 versus 9500/500 reasoning from the case material.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: A crude overlap doctrine that ignores absolute study burden.

test_description: Compare two crude policies against the reviewed footnote case: always glue every footnote vs always re-excerpt every footnote.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether footnote doctrine collapses into an unusable extreme.

test_description: Compare a perfectly isolated split of `من` and `الباء` against a split that retains the shared framing phrase.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether separation doctrine wrongly ignores beneficial relational overlap.

test_description: Create individual example excerpts but strip `فمن استعمال من` / `ومن استعمال الباء` from them.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether example units become blunter or less safely anchored when their framing phrase is removed.

test_description: Compare a system where examples exist only inside theory excerpts against one where they also exist as separate practice-facing units.
what_failure_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether dual-placement doctrine is actually needed for study flow rather than merely aesthetically attractive.
